title: Jamie Dimon warns of 'some kind of bond crisis' ahead as global debt risks build
summary_full: Dimon, who runs JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest bank by market cap, said that today's growing mix of risks could combine in unpredictable ways.
summary_public: Dimon, who runs JPMorgan Chase, the world's largest bank by market cap, said that today's growing mix of risks could combine in unpredictable ways.
